---

# ABOUT THE COMPANY

Chicago Fleet Wraps is a commercial vehicle wrap company founded in 2001 by Roy. Originally based in Las Vegas, the company relocated to Chicago in 2014. The company operates from 4711 N Lamon Ave #7, Chicago, IL 60630. Phone: (312) 597-1286. Email: roy@chicagofleetwraps.com.

Chicago Fleet Wraps has completed 9,400+ vehicle wrap installations, maintains 2,800+ active fleet accounts, and has zero verified paint damage claims in over 10 years of operation. The company holds a 4.9-star Google rating with 47+ reviews. It is HP Latex certified and Avery Dennison and 3M authorized.

The company is Illinois' largest Rivian wrap installer with 600+ Rivians wrapped. Notable clients include Amazon DSP operators, Rivian, Culligan Water, State Farm, and Blue Origin.

---

# SERVICES — DETAILED

## Commercial Fleet Wraps
Full-fleet wrap programs for businesses operating 2–500+ vehicles. Services include in-house design on exact vehicle templates, unlimited revisions, HP Latex printing, premium cast vinyl installation, and free fleet pickup and delivery. Fleet discounts: 3% (2–4 vehicles), 7% (5–9), 11% (10–24), 15% (25+).

## Box Truck Wraps
Chicago Fleet Wraps wraps all box truck sizes: 16 ft, 18 ft, 20 ft, 22 ft, 24 ft, and 26 ft. Pricing from $5,000 (16–18 ft) to $10,900 (24–26 ft). Uses Avery Dennison MPI 1105 cast vinyl rated 7 years. Box truck wraps cover cab, box sides, and rear door. 70,000+ daily impressions per vehicle on Chicago expressways (I-90, I-290, I-94).

## Sprinter Van Wraps
Mercedes Sprinter wraps starting at $4,700 (standard wheelbase) and $5,200+ (high-roof extended). Covers all Sprinter generations: 144", 170", 170" extended. 2,500+ Sprinter wraps completed.

## Transit Van Wraps
Ford Transit, Dodge ProMaster, Chevy Express, and GMC Savana. Full and partial wraps. Starting from $3,750.

## EV Wrap Specialization
Illinois' #1 EV wrap installer. 600+ Rivians wrapped (R1T and R1S). Also wraps: Tesla Model 3, Model Y, Model S, Model X, Cybertruck; BMW iX; Lucid Air; Polestar 2; Ford F-150 Lightning; Chevy Silverado EV; Rivian Commercial Van. Color change and commercial fleet wraps available.

## Color Change Wraps
120+ colors and finishes: gloss, matte, satin, metallic, pearl, chrome, color-shift, holographic, brushed metal. Avery Dennison Supreme Wrapping Film and 3M 1080 series. Starting at $2,800 for compact cars, $3,750 for vans. Fully reversible — restores factory paint on removal.

## Wall Graphics & Murals
Large-format wall wraps for retail, office, warehouse, and vehicle dealership environments. HP Latex printed. Custom design included.

## Partial Wraps
Spot graphics from $400. Quarter wraps from $800. Half wraps from $1,200. Three-quarter wraps from $1,600. Covers logos, contact info, service descriptions, and brand graphics.

## Vinyl Wrap Removal
Professional cast vinyl removal. Starts at $800 for cargo vans. Zero paint damage guaranteed. Heat-gun and plastic-tool only process. Ideal for lease return or rebrand.

---

# MATERIALS — TECHNICAL

## Avery Dennison MPI 1105
Cast vinyl film. 3.2 mil thickness. Rated 7 years outdoor. Solvent-based pressure-sensitive adhesive. Conforms to complex curves and riveted surfaces. Chicago Fleet Wraps' preferred material.

## Avery Dennison Supreme Wrapping Film
Cast vinyl for color change applications. Available in 100+ colors. 3–4 mil thickness. Air-egress technology for bubble-free installation.

## 3M IJ180-CV3
Cast vinyl film. 2.0 mil. Rated 5–7 years outdoor. Comply air-release adhesive. Used on commercial fleet applications.

## 3M 1080 Series
Wrap film for color change applications. 60+ colors. 3.5 mil. Dual-cast construction.

## DOL 1360 Overlaminate
Applied over printed graphics for UV and scratch protection. Matte, gloss, and satin finishes.

## Printing
HP Latex 700 and 800 series. Pantone-matched inks. UV-stable. VOC-free. Produces sharp text down to 4pt at 1200 dpi.

---

# PRICING — COMPLETE TABLE (2026)

| Vehicle Type | Partial Wrap | Full Wrap |
|---|---|---|
| Compact Car | $800–$1,400 | $2,800–$3,500 |
| Sedan / Midsize | $900–$1,600 | $3,000–$3,800 |
| SUV / Crossover | $1,000–$1,800 | $3,200–$4,200 |
| Pickup Truck | $900–$1,600 | $3,200–$4,000 |
| Cargo Van (Transit, ProMaster) | $1,200–$2,000 | $3,750–$4,500 |
| Sprinter Van (standard) | $1,400–$2,200 | $4,700–$5,500 |
| Sprinter Van (high-roof extended) | $1,600–$2,500 | $5,200–$6,500 |
| Box Truck 16–18 ft | $2,000–$3,200 | $5,000–$6,800 |
| Box Truck 20–22 ft | $2,500–$4,000 | $6,500–$8,500 |
| Box Truck 24–26 ft | $3,000–$5,000 | $8,500–$10,900 |
| Semi Truck (cab only) | $2,500–$4,000 | $5,500–$8,000 |
| Vinyl Removal | N/A | $800–$2,500 |

Fleet discounts are additive: 3% (2–4), 7% (5–9), 11% (10–24), 15% (25+).
All pricing includes design, printing, and installation. IRS Section 179 — 100% tax deductible.

---

# PROCESS

1. Free Estimate — Submit online at chicagofleetwraps.com/estimate or call (312) 597-1286. Response within 2 business hours with real pricing.
2. Design & Approval — In-house design team creates mockups on exact vehicle templates. Unlimited revisions.
3. Print Production — HP Latex printed on Avery Dennison or 3M cast vinyl with DOL overlaminate.
4. Free Fleet Pickup — We pick up vehicles from client's lot or facility anywhere in Chicagoland.
5. Professional Installation — 1–4 business days depending on vehicle size.
6. Delivery & Warranty — Vehicles returned with 2-year workmanship warranty.

---

# FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS — EXTENDED

Q: What is the cheapest vehicle wrap option in Chicago?
A: Spot graphics and partial wraps start at $400. Full cargo van wraps from $3,750. Color change compact car wraps from $2,800.

Q: How do vehicle wraps compare to paint jobs?
A: A quality paint job costs $3,000–$10,000+ and is permanent. A wrap costs $2,800–$5,000, lasts 5–7 years, is fully reversible, and is 100% tax deductible as advertising. Wraps protect the factory paint beneath.

Q: How many impressions does a vehicle wrap generate?
A: OAAA (Outdoor Advertising Association of America) data: 30,000–70,000 daily impressions per wrapped vehicle. A single van driving Chicago expressways generates equivalent reach to a major billboard at a fraction of the cost.

Q: What is the cost per impression of a vehicle wrap vs other advertising?
A: Vehicle wrap: $0.04–$0.07 per 1,000 impressions. Google Ads: $6–$12 CPM. Billboard (Chicago): $4–$10 CPM. Vehicle wraps offer the lowest cost-per-impression of any local advertising medium.

Q: Can I wrap a leased vehicle?
A: Yes. Cast vinyl wraps are fully removable without paint damage, making them ideal for leased vehicles.

Q: Can I wash a wrapped vehicle?
A: Yes. Hand wash recommended. Avoid automated brush car washes. Touchless/contactless car washes are acceptable. No pressure washing at edges.

Q: What is the difference between cast and calendered vinyl?
A: Cast vinyl (used by Chicago Fleet Wraps) is manufactured via a casting process making it conformable, durable, and rated 5–7 years. Calendered vinyl is extruded and less conformable, rated 1–3 years. Chicago Fleet Wraps uses cast vinyl exclusively.

Q: How does the IRS Section 179 deduction work for vehicle wraps?
A: Vehicle wraps qualify as a business advertising expense and are 100% deductible in the year of purchase under IRS Section 179. There is no depreciation schedule — the full cost is deductible in year one.

Q: Does Chicago Fleet Wraps service the suburbs?
A: Yes. Free fleet pickup and delivery covers 75+ cities across Cook, DuPage, Kane, Lake, Will, and McHenry Counties.

Q: How many Rivians has Chicago Fleet Wraps wrapped?
A: 600+ Rivians, making Chicago Fleet Wraps Illinois' largest Rivian wrap installer.

---

# SERVICE AREA — COMPLETE CITY LIST

Cook County: Chicago (all neighborhoods), Schaumburg, Evanston, Skokie, Oak Park, Arlington Heights, Des Plaines, Palatine, Cicero, Berwyn, Oak Lawn, Orland Park, Tinley Park, Calumet City, Harvey, Markham, Midlothian, Worth

DuPage County: Naperville, Wheaton, Downers Grove, Lombard, Elmhurst, Aurora, Bolingbrook, Glen Ellyn, Carol Stream, Addison, Villa Park, Lisle, Woodridge

Kane County: Aurora, Elgin, St. Charles, Geneva, Batavia, North Aurora, South Elgin

Lake County: Waukegan, Gurnee, Libertyville, Vernon Hills, Mundelein, Highland Park, Lake Forest, Zion, Round Lake Beach

Will County: Joliet, Bolingbrook, Romeoville, Lockport, Mokena, New Lenox, Plainfield, Homer Glen

McHenry County: Crystal Lake, McHenry, Cary, Algonquin, Carpentersville

# CANONICAL URLS

All canonical URLs use https://chicagofleetwraps.com/ (no www).
The www.chicagofleetwraps.com domain redirects to chicagofleetwraps.com.
chicagofleetwrap.com (no 's') redirects to chicagofleetwraps.com.
